task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected /99_system as required by root AGENTS, and used canonical cast record for named entity.
function.outcome_justification: Using current date from context (2026-03-02) and birthday data found in visible cast records, the nearest upcoming birthday date is 04-04; canonical file /10_entities/cast/petra.md provides the exact name Petra Novak.
